smoke_test.name: Quick smoke test (2 epochs, BW only)
smoke_test.description: Fast end-to-end validation of the construct → train pipeline.

example_methods.name: Compare example construction methods
example_methods.description: Methods 0, 8, and 14 were the top performers in v2 experiments.

nwords.name: Compare context window sizes
nwords.description: How many context words around the event term to include.

lr_explore.name: Learning rate exploration
lr_explore.description: Grid search over learning rates with PubMedBERT.

lr_bw.name: Learning rate tuning for Boxed Warnings (issue #25)
lr_bw.description: Tune LR for BW section using pretrained ALL model.

sections.name: Compare performance across sections
sections.description: Train independently on each section and combined.

split_method.name: 80/10/10 vs TAC split
split_method.description: Compare random drug split to the original TAC train/test split.

networks_base.name: Compare base BERT architectures (hidden=768)
networks_base.description: Hold all training parameters fixed at known-good settings and vary only the base model. Includes domain-specific biomedical models and vanilla BERT as a baseline.

networks_large.name: Compare large BERT architectures (hidden>=1024)
networks_large.description: Same fixed settings as networks_base but with larger models. Uses smaller batch size to avoid OOM.

flag_baseline.name: Baseline for flag experiments (no filtering)
flag_baseline.description: Same settings as flag experiments but no annotation filtering. Comparison baseline for Hypotheses 1-3.

flag1_clean.name: Exclude noisy annotations (Hypothesis 1)
flag1_clean.description: Remove duplicate and unmapped annotations from training data to reduce label noise. Expects ~2% of events to be excluded.

flag2_human_only.name: Exclude class/animal inferred events (Hypothesis 2)
flag2_human_only.description: Remove DrugClass and Animal annotations, keeping only drug-specific human data. Effect should be strongest in WP (~10% DrugClass) and BW (higher Animal).

flag_both.name: Exclude noisy + inferred annotations (Hypothesis 3)
flag_both.description: Combine Flag 1 and Flag 2 filtering for cleanest training signal. Tests whether combined filtering helps more than either alone.
